briefdescription.para: LMS signature size for H=5, w=4.
Test message for LMS signature verification (128 bytes)
LMS public key (56 bytes) Format: lms_type (4) + otstype (4) + I (16) + T[1] (32)
LMS signature (2348 bytes) Format: q (4) + ots_sig + tree_path.
To notify the call back from client library.
Status variable to store the error returned from server.
Call back function which will be registered with library to notify the completion of request.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the call back reference.

Status of the request will be passed as an argument during callback
0 Upon success
Error code from ASUFW application upon any error

briefdescription.para: This function demonstrates LMS signature verification.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if LMS signature verification is successful.

simplesect.para: The signature and public key used here are sample values. For actual verification, use properly generated LMS keys and signatures.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the XAsu_LmsSignVerify() API.
